channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: 🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança Visão geral: • 3 itens críticos • 43 itens de alta criticidade • 55 CVEs novas • 6 exploits/advisories novos • Upwind Partners with Microsoft to Deliver Runtime Security for Azure Workloads - The Joplin Globe • CVE-2026-1527 - Elastic • CVE-2026-1527 - Elastic • CVE-2026-32249 - Check Point • Security Flaw in WordPress Plugin Puts 400,000 Websites at Risk - TechRepublic
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Segurança - Acronis / Check Point / SentinelOne
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Inteligência de Ameaças - CIS Advisories

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] Upwind Partners with Microsoft to Deliver Runtime Security for Azure Workloads - The Joplin Globe
item.description: 📰 Notícia: Upwind Partners with Microsoft to Deliver Runtime Security for Azure Workloads - The Joplin Globe Criticidade: Baixa Ferramenta: Azure Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: Google News RSS CVSS: N/D Resumo: Upwind Partners with Microsoft to Deliver Runtime Security for Azure Workloads The Joplin Globe Link: https://news.google.?oc=5

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-1527 - Elastic
[Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-1527 - Elastic
[Segurança] CVE-2026-32249 - Check Point
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-32249 - Check Point Criticidade: Média Ferramenta: Check Point Categoria: Segurança Fonte: NVD CVSS: 5.3 Resumo: Vim is an open source, command line text editor. From 9.1.0011 to before 9.2.0137, Vim's NFA regex compiler, when encountering a collection containing a combining character as the endpoint of a character range (e.g. [0-0\u05bb]), incorrectly emits the composing bytes of that character as separate NFA states. This corrupts the NFA postfix stack, resulting in NFA_START_COLL having a NULL out1 pointer. When nfa_max_width() subsequently traverses the compiled NFA to estimate match width for the look-behind assertion, it dereferences state->out1->out without a NULL check, causing a segmentation fault. This vulnerability is fixed in 9.2.0137. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-32249

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] Security Flaw in WordPress Plugin Puts 400,000 Websites at Risk - TechRepublic

item.description: 📰 Notícia: March 25, 2026 – Extend Your Existing APIs for Agentic Workflows with Spring HATEAOS Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: VMware Categoria: Infraestrutura Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed CVSS: N/D Resumo: Live WebinarWednesday, March 25, 20269:00 AM PTRegister Now DescriptionEnterprises have spent billions of dollars integrating REST APIs to infuse business logic, workflows, and data into their application portfolios; they’re expected to continue spending to the tune of $30 Billion by 2033 according to some estimates, with the expectation that these investments will reinforce their aspirations … Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/tanzu/march-25-2026-extend-your-existing-apis-for-agentic-workflows-with-spring-hateaos/

item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-21672 - Windows Server Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Windows Server Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 8.8 Resumo: A vulnerability allowing local privilege escalation on Windows-based Veeam Backup & Replication servers. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-21672

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8089-1: Go Networking vulnerabilities
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: USN-8089-1: Go Networking vulnerabilities Criticidade: Baixa Ferramenta: Ubuntu Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml CVSS: 2.0 Resumo: Bahruz Jabiyev, Tommaso Innocenti, Anthony Gavazzi, Steven Sprecher, and Kaan Onarlioglu discovered that servers using Go Networking could hang during shutdown if preempted by a fatal error. An attacker could possibly use this to cause a denial of service. This issue only affected Ubuntu 22.04 LTS. (CVE-2022-27664) Arpad Ryszka and Jakob Ackermann discovered that a maliciously crafted stream could cause excessive CPU usage in Go Networking's HPACK decoder. An attacker could possibly use this to cause a denial of service. This issue only affe... Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8089-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] From transparency to action: What the latest Microsoft email security benchmark reveals - Microsoft
item.description: 📰 Notícia: From transparency to action: What the latest Microsoft email security benchmark reveals - Microsoft Criticidade: Baixa Ferramenta: Office Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: Google News RSS CVSS: N/D Resumo: From transparency to action: What the latest Microsoft email security benchmark reveals Microsoft Link: https://news.google.?oc=5

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8088-1: go-git vulnerabilities
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: USN-8088-1: go-git vulnerabilities Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Ubuntu Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml CVSS: N/D Resumo: Ionut Lalu discovered that go-git incorrectly handled certain specially crafted Git server responses. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of service. (CVE-2023-49568, CVE-2025-21614) Ionut Lalu discovered that go-git incorrectly handled file system paths when using the ChrootOS implementation. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to perform a path traversal and create or modify arbitrary files, leading to remote code execution. (CVE-2023-49569) It was discovered that go-git did not properly sanitize argumen... Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8088-1

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Where Logic and Creativity Meet: Libby Shen on Building Sustainable Solutions with VMware Cloud Foundation
item.description: 📰 Notícia: Where Logic and Creativity Meet: Libby Shen on Building Sustainable Solutions with VMware Cloud Foundation Criticidade: Baixa Ferramenta: VMware Categoria: Infraestrutura Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed CVSS: N/D Resumo: If you want to go fast, go alone. If you want to go far, go together. – African Proverb For Libby Shen, this isn’t just a favorite quote—it is the guiding principle of her 25-year career in technology. As a National Principal Architect at Broadcom, working on the VMware Cloud Foundation Professional Services team, Libby … Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/03/12/where-logic-and-creativity-meet-libby-shen-on-building-sustainable-solutions-with-vmware-cloud-foundation/

We also share our latest blogs, videos, and upcoming events. Link: https://www.elastic.co/blog/devrel-newsletter-march-2026

Link: https://www.elastic.co/blog/cyber-strategy-for-america

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-32117 - Grafana
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-32117 - Grafana Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Grafana Categoria: Infraestrutura Fonte: NVD CVSS: 7.6 Resumo: The grafanacubism-panel plugin allows use of cubism.js in Grafana. In 0.1.2 and earlier, the panel's zoom-link handler passes a dashboard-editor-supplied URL directly to window.location.assign() / window.open() with no scheme validation. An attacker with dashboard Editor privileges can set the link to a javascript: URI; when any Viewer drag-zooms on the panel, the payload executes in the Grafana origin. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-32117

These efforts connect professionals globally, amplify contributions, and drive engagement across forums, events, blogs, podcasts, and social media. As of February 2026, the landscape includes the unified … Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/vmtn/2026/03/vmware-community-programs-for-2026.html

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-31979 - Azure
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-31979 - Azure Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Azure Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 8.8 Resumo: Himmelblau is an interoperability suite for Microsoft Azure Entra ID and Intune. Prior to 3.1.0 and 2.3.8, the himmelblaud-tasks daemon, running as root, writes Kerberos cache files under /tmp/krb5cc_ without symlink protections. Since commit 87a51ee, PrivateTmp is explicitly removed from the tasks daemon's systemd hardening, exposing it to the host /tmp. A local user can exploit this via symlink attacks to chown or overwrite arbitrary files, achieving local privilege escalation. This vulnerability is fixed in 3.1.0 and 2.3.8. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-31979

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-31957 - Azure
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-31957 - Azure Criticidade: Crítica Ferramenta: Azure Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 10.0 Resumo: Himmelblau is an interoperability suite for Microsoft Azure Entra ID and Intune. From 3.0.0 to before 3.1.0, if Himmelblau is deployed without a configured tenant domain in himmelblau.conf, authentication is not tenant-scoped. In this mode, Himmelblau can accept authentication attempts for arbitrary Entra ID domains by dynamically registering providers at runtime. This behavior is intended for initial/local bootstrap scenarios, but it can create risk in remote authentication environments. This vulnerability is fixed in 3.1.0. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-31957

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] Vulnerabilidade crítica no plugin Ally do WordPress expõe centenas de milhares de sites - TugaTech
item.description: 📰 Notícia: Vulnerabilidade crítica no plugin Ally do WordPress expõe centenas de milhares de sites - TugaTech Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: WordPress Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: Google News RSS CVSS: N/D Resumo: Vulnerabilidade crítica no plugin Ally do WordPress expõe centenas de milhares de sites TugaTech Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiugFBVV95cUxPa2I2NWNKRWF0YnpXVnVXcXJuMmk0azNWQUZxdEFNQVdZV3UwdVo4YVN4V1JzQkJvLVFhbl9fSGpqSnhpblFJcE1HQ0tEQ0RFalFiTzJlNVlwcVRROEtCMmloRk9oLXhiOTMweDRSa3lWM2x6YjVOWkFOOEhudm1oU0QwQ2hXR3hpbUZhN2FyQlBvX3k4RG1fdGhHZDNGcmpRRVVmZ2U5M2h1eTFQM1NXeVhBY2c0N1dtQ0E?oc=5

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-30953 - Docker
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-30953 - Docker Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Docker Categoria: Infraestrutura Fonte: NVD CVSS: 7.7 Resumo: LinkAce is a self-hosted archive to collect website links. When a user creates a link via POST /links, the server fetches HTML metadata from the provided URL (LinkRepository::create() calls HtmlMeta::getFromUrl()). The LinkStoreRequest validation rules do not include NoPrivateIpRule, allowing server-side requests to internal network addresses, Docker service hostnames, and cloud metadata endpoints. The project already has a NoPrivateIpRule class (app/Rules/NoPrivateIpRule.php) but it is only applied in FetchController.php (line 99), not in the primary link creation path. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-30953

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2025-66413 - Windows Server
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2025-66413 - Windows Server Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Windows Server Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 7.4 Resumo: Git for Windows is the Windows port of Git. Prior to 2.53.0(2), it is possible to obtain a user's NTLM hash by tricking them into cloning from a malicious server. Since NTLM hashing is weak, it is possible for the attacker to brute-force the user's account name and password. This vulnerability is fixed in 2.53.0(2). Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-66413

item.title: [Inteligência de Ameaças] Multiple Vulnerabilities in Mozilla Firefox Could Allow for Arbitrary Code Execution
item.description: 💣 Notícia: Multiple Vulnerabilities in Mozilla Firefox Could Allow for Arbitrary Code Execution Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: CIS Advisories Categoria: Inteligência de Ameaças Fonte: CIS Advisories CVSS: N/D Resumo: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in Mozilla Firefox, the most severe of which could allow for arbitrary code execution. Mozilla Firefox is a web browser used to access the Internet. Successful exploitation of the most severe of these vulnerabilities could allow for arbitrary code execution. Depending on the privileges associated with the user an attacker could then install programs; view, change, or delete data; or create new accounts with full user rights. Users whose accounts are configured to have fewer user rights on the sys... Link: https://www.cisecurity.org/advisory/multiple-vulnerabilities-in-mozilla-firefox-could-allow-for-arbitrary-code-execution_2026-022

item.title: [Inteligência de Ameaças] Critical Patches Issued for Microsoft Products, March 10, 2026
item.description: 💣 Notícia: Critical Patches Issued for Microsoft Products, March 10, 2026 Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: CIS Advisories Categoria: Inteligência de Ameaças Fonte: CIS Advisories CVSS: N/D Resumo: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in Microsoft products, the most severe of which could allow for remote code execution. Successful exploitation of the most severe of these vulnerabilities could result in an attacker gaining the same privileges as the logged-on user. Depending on the privileges associated with the user, an attacker could then install programs; view, change, or delete data; or create new accounts with full user rights. Users whose accounts are configured to have fewer user rights on the system could be less impact... Link: https://www.cisecurity.org/advisory/critical-patches-issued-for-microsoft-products-march-10-2026_2026-021

item.title: [Inteligência de Ameaças] Multiple Vulnerabilities in Adobe Products Could Allow for Arbitrary Code Execution
item.description: 📢 Notícia: Multiple Vulnerabilities in Adobe Products Could Allow for Arbitrary Code Execution Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: CIS Advisories Categoria: Inteligência de Ameaças Fonte: CIS Advisories CVSS: N/D Resumo: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in Adobe products, the most severe of which could allow for arbitrary code execution. Adobe Acrobat is a comprehensive software family designed to create, edit, manage, and sign PDF documents across desktop, web, and mobile devices. Adobe Commerce is a composable ecommerce solution that lets you quickly create global, multi-brand B2C and B2B experiences all from one cloud-native platform. Adobe DNG Software Development Kit (SDK) is a free set of tools and code that helps developers add support fo... Link: https://www.cisecurity.org/advisory/multiple-vulnerabilities-in-adobe-products-could-allow-for-arbitrary-code-execution_2026-020

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-26128 - Windows Server
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-26128 - Windows Server Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Windows Server Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 7.8 Resumo: Improper authentication in Windows SMB Server allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-26128

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-26113 - Office
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-26113 - Office Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Office Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 8.4 Resumo: Untrusted pointer dereference in Microsoft Office allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code locally. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-26113

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-26112 - Office
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-26112 - Office Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Office Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 7.8 Resumo: Untrusted pointer dereference in Microsoft Office Excel allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code locally. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-26112

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-26110 - Office
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-26110 - Office Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Office Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 8.4 Resumo: Access of resource using incompatible type ('type confusion') in Microsoft Office allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code locally. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-26110

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-26109 - Office
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-26109 - Office Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Office Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 8.4 Resumo: Out-of-bounds read in Microsoft Office Excel allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code locally. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-26109

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-26108 - Office
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-26108 - Office Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Office Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 7.8 Resumo: Heap-based buffer overflow in Microsoft Office Excel allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code locally. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-26108

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-26107 - Office
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-26107 - Office Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Office Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 7.8 Resumo: Use after free in Microsoft Office Excel allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code locally. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-26107

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-26106 - Office
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-26106 - Office Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Office Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 8.8 Resumo: Improper input validation in Microsoft Office SharePoint allows an authorized attacker to execute code over a network. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-26106

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-26105 - Office
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-26105 - Office Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Office Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 8.1 Resumo: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') in Microsoft Office SharePoint allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-26105

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-24294 - Windows Server
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-24294 - Windows Server Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Windows Server Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 7.8 Resumo: Improper authentication in Windows SMB Server allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-24294

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-24283 - Windows Server
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-24283 - Windows Server Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Windows Server Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 8.8 Resumo: Heap-based buffer overflow in Windows File Server allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-24283

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-23665 - Azure
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-23665 - Azure Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Azure Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 7.8 Resumo: Heap-based buffer overflow in Azure Linux Virtual Machines allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-23665

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-23664 - Azure
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-23664 - Azure Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Azure Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 7.5 Resumo: Improper restriction of communication channel to intended endpoints in Azure IoT Explorer allows an unauthorized attacker to disclose information over a network. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-23664

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-23662 - Azure
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-23662 - Azure Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Azure Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 7.5 Resumo: Missing authentication for critical function in Azure IoT Explorer allows an unauthorized attacker to disclose information over a network. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-23662

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-23661 - Azure
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-23661 - Azure Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Azure Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 7.5 Resumo: Cleartext transmission of sensitive information in Azure IoT Explorer allows an unauthorized attacker to disclose information over a network. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-23661

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-23660 - Azure
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-23660 - Azure Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Azure Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 7.8 Resumo: Improper access control in Azure Portal Windows Admin Center allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-23660

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] Hackers are selling a critical Windows zero-day exploit for $220,000 on the dark web - TechSpot
item.description: 💣 Notícia: Hackers are selling a critical Windows zero-day exploit for $220,000 on the dark web - TechSpot Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Windows Server Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: Google News RSS CVSS: N/D Resumo: Hackers are selling a critical Windows zero-day exploit for $220,000 on the dark web TechSpot Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinwFBVV95cUxQVGtJX1NBYmVfWEg0b1dkV1I0Vlk2NG5zSjE5U2xSemZIX2Q2R1F0LS1JZVpDM1duYTdoMXY2dzVrd1dyRTMwaldJakZVMnhjUW5BVFNwQW91WHNOVjA2eHEzLTBnbk1oV29jU1A1LVVhTi1TemxyQTQ0YmtPUUhYbHROQWpPVGJvMk1OcjY5UUtLZXNMd19WZUY2Wi1rRnM?oc=5

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-28691 - Check Point
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-28691 - Check Point Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Check Point Categoria: Segurança Fonte: NVD CVSS: 7.5 Resumo: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41, an uninitialized pointer dereference vulnerability exists in the JBIG decoder due to a missing check. This vulnerability is fixed in 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-28691

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] Hackers are selling a Windows exploit for $220,000 on the dark web - Neowin
item.description: 💣 Notícia: Hackers are selling a Windows exploit for $220,000 on the dark web - Neowin Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Windows Server Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: Google News RSS CVSS: N/D Resumo: Hackers are selling a Windows exploit for $220,000 on the dark web Neowin Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimAFBVV95cUxNMkh3cnlZdmViak1pZkFTaGx2aG1pN3M1a3hnUVA4MGpTZW1VYnJENHpHN2pvczBPMWNKNG1iczVzVEcwTFcyeWR6SWVCYjRfcnZfbV9feHpQLW9EVWtwbVhKa3dUVWljMUJndGFXeU5Wa0dOSWM3NndRSkhVZDdrWS1FTlJEeHB4TVgzUTByTnBtbmExZ3RRNA?oc=5

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-3288 - Nginx
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-3288 - Nginx Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Nginx Categoria: Infraestrutura Fonte: NVD CVSS: 8.8 Resumo: A security issue was discovered in ingress-nginx where the `nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target` Ingress annotation can be used to inject configuration into nginx. This can lead to arbitrary code execution in the context of the ingress-nginx controller, and disclosure of Secrets accessible to the controller. (Note that in the default installation, the controller can access all Secrets cluster-wide.) Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-3288

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] 1Password - Review 2026 - PCMag Middle East
item.description: 📰 Notícia: 1Password - Review 2026 - PCMag Middle East Criticidade: Baixa Ferramenta: 1Password Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: Google News RSS CVSS: N/D Resumo: 1Password - Review 2026 PCMag Middle East Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiaEFVX3lxTFBKN3BoZUJHWHh2VmpSeWo3N21mVkFKNTZIWTVmNDFjYml0MlNES0xvMDFCTWV5ZDlHaXdJRlZJdE13M2prWHhZekdvb01YZkc1VVBCOGJ2OFF4bU40cVhZZ3AyeXVmZ3FD?oc=5

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] Microsoft releases new Defender update for Windows 11, 10, Server ISO installations - Neowin
item.description: 📰 Notícia: Microsoft releases new Defender update for Windows 11, 10, Server ISO installations - Neowin Criticidade: Média Ferramenta: Windows Server Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: Google News RSS CVSS: N/D Resumo: Microsoft releases new Defender update for Windows 11, 10, Server ISO installations Neowin Link: https://news.google.?oc=5

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-30247 - Docker
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-30247 - Docker Criticidade: Média Ferramenta: Docker Categoria: Infraestrutura Fonte: NVD CVSS: 5.9 Resumo: WeKnora is an LLM-powered framework designed for deep document understanding and semantic retrieval. Prior to version 0.2.12, the application's "Import document via URL" feature is vulnerable to Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) through HTTP redirects. While the backend implements comprehensive URL validation (blocking private IPs, loopback addresses, reserved hostnames, and cloud metadata endpoints), it fails to validate redirect targets. An attacker can bypass all protections by using a redirect chain, forcing the server to access internal services. Additionally, Docker-specific internal addresses like host.docker.internal are not blocked. This issue has been patched in version 0.2.12. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-30247

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-1981 - WordPress
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-1981 - WordPress Criticidade: Média Ferramenta: WordPress Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 4.3 Resumo: The HUMN-1 AI Website Scanner & Human Certification by Winston AI plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized modification of data due to a missing capability check on the winston_disconnect() function in all versions up to, and including, 0.0.3. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Subscriber-level access and above, to reset the plugin's API connection settings via the 'winston_disconnect' AJAX action. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-1981

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-1644 - WordPress
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-1644 - WordPress Criticidade: Média Ferramenta: WordPress Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 4.3 Resumo: The WP Frontend Profile plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in all versions up to, and including, 1.3.8. This is due to missing nonce validation on the 'update_action' function. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to approve or reject user account registrations via a forged request granted they can trick an administrator into performing an action such as clicking on a link. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-1644

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-30242 - Check Point
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-30242 - Check Point Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Check Point Categoria: Segurança Fonte: NVD CVSS: 8.5 Resumo: Plane is an an open-source project management tool. Prior to version 1.2.3, the webhook URL validation in plane/app/serializers/webhook.py only checks ip.is_loopback, allowing attackers with workspace ADMIN role to create webhooks pointing to private/internal network addresses (10.x.x.x, 172.16.x.x, 192.168.x.x, 169.254.169.254, etc.). When webhook events fire, the server makes requests to these internal addresses and stores the response — enabling SSRF with full response read-back. This issue has been patched in version 1.2.3. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-30242

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2025-69651 - Check Point
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2025-69651 - Check Point Criticidade: Média Ferramenta: Check Point Categoria: Segurança Fonte: NVD CVSS: 5.5 Resumo: GNU Binutils thru 2.46 readelf contains a vulnerability that leads to an invalid pointer free when processing a crafted ELF binary with malformed relocation or symbol data. If dump_relocations returns early due to parsing errors, the internal all_relocations array may remain partially uninitialized. Later, process_got_section_contents() may attempt to free an invalid r_symbol pointer, triggering memory corruption checks in glibc and causing the program to terminate with SIGABRT. No evidence of further memory corruption or code execution was observed; the impact is limited to denial of service. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-69651

item.title: [Infraestrutura] 12 Open-Source Container Security Tools [By Use Case] - wiz.io
item.description: 📰 Notícia: 12 Open-Source Container Security Tools [By Use Case] - wiz.io Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Docker Categoria: Infraestrutura Fonte: Google News RSS CVSS: N/D Resumo: 12 Open-Source Container Security Tools [By Use Case] wiz.io Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiigFBVV95cUxPS0JQVk9CTVNJZGpZZFgtektkQi1KTDhNZjBSSHF0ZC1WMXZxV2xBWERHa2YxM1VSdVdfNDRPN0F1a3FzSUJGTVpxYkNGSXBuYTVnUldydjdGSVFOaU1qWVZhZTcwczJ6bWFKSFh2ekxvNGpQMTlhZDBLd01aSWsxTVdxcWI2aVhrZ3c?oc=5

item.title: [Segurança] Check Point lança serviço para estruturar governança e reduzir riscos na adoção de IA - ipnews.com.br
item.description: 📰 Notícia: Check Point lança serviço para estruturar governança e reduzir riscos na adoção de IA - ipnews.com.br Criticidade: Baixa Ferramenta: Check Point Categoria: Segurança Fonte: Google News RSS CVSS: N/D Resumo: Check Point lança serviço para estruturar governança e reduzir riscos na adoção de IA ipnews.com.br Link: https://news.google.?oc=5

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-3589 - WordPress
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-3589 - WordPress Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: WordPress Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 7.5 Resumo: The WooCommerce WordPress plugin from versions 5.4.0 to 10.5.2 does not properly handle batch requests, which could allow unauthenticated users to make a logged in admin call non store/WC REST endpoints, and create arbitrary admin users via a CSRF attack for example. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-3589

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-23925 - Zabbix
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-23925 - Zabbix Criticidade: Média Ferramenta: Zabbix Categoria: Infraestrutura Fonte: NVD CVSS: N/D Resumo: An authenticated Zabbix user (User role) with template/host write permissions is able to create objects via the configuration.import API. This can lead to confidentiality loss by creating unauthorized hosts. Note that the User role is normally not sufficient to create and edit templates/hosts even with write permissions. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-23925

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-2830 - WordPress
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-2830 - WordPress Criticidade: Média Ferramenta: WordPress Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 6.1 Resumo: The WP All Import – Drag & Drop Import for CSV, XML, Excel & Google Sheets plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Reflected Cross-Site Scripting via the ‘filepath’ parameter in all versions up to, and including, 4.0.0 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that execute if they can successfully trick a user into performing an action such as clicking on a link. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-2830

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-2446 - WordPress
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-2446 - WordPress Criticidade: Crítica Ferramenta: WordPress Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 9.8 Resumo: The PowerPack for LearnDash WordPress plugin before 1.3.0 does not have authorization and CRSF checks in an AJAX action, allowing unauthenticated users to update arbitrary WordPress options (such as default_role etc) and create arbitrary admin users Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-2446

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-1128 - WordPress
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-1128 - WordPress Criticidade: Média Ferramenta: WordPress Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 4.3 Resumo: The WP eCommerce WordPress plugin through 3.15.1 does not have CSRF check in place when deleting coupons, which could allow attackers to make a logged in admin remove them via a CSRF attack Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-1128

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-29093 - Docker
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-29093 - Docker Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Docker Categoria: Infraestrutura Fonte: NVD CVSS: 8.1 Resumo: WWBN AVideo is an open source video platform. Prior to version 24.0, the official docker-compose.yml publishes the memcached service on host port 11211 (0.0.0.0:11211) with no authentication, while the Dockerfile configures PHP to store all user sessions in that memcached instance. An attacker who can reach port 11211 can read, modify, or flush session data — enabling session hijacking, admin impersonation, and mass session destruction without any application-level authentication. This issue has been patched in version 24.0. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-29093

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-2589 - WordPress
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-2589 - WordPress Criticidade: Média Ferramenta: WordPress Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 5.3 Resumo: The Greenshift – animation and page builder blocks plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in all versions up to, and including, 12.8.3 via the automated Settings Backup stored in a publicly accessible file. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to extract sensitive data including the configured OpenAI, Claude, Google Maps, Gemini, DeepSeek, and Cloudflare Turnstile API keys. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-2589

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-28712 - Acronis
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-28712 - Acronis Criticidade: Média Ferramenta: Acronis Categoria: Segurança Fonte: NVD CVSS: 6.3 Resumo: Local privilege escalation due to DLL hijacking vulnerability. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Windows) before build 41186. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-28712

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-28711 - Acronis
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-28711 - Acronis Criticidade: Média Ferramenta: Acronis Categoria: Segurança Fonte: NVD CVSS: 6.3 Resumo: Local privilege escalation due to DLL hijacking vulnerability. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Windows) before build 41186. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-28711

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-28710 - Acronis
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-28710 - Acronis Criticidade: Crítica Ferramenta: Acronis Categoria: Segurança Fonte: NVD CVSS: 9.8 Resumo: Sensitive information disclosure and manipulation due to improper authentication. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Linux, Windows) before build 41186. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-28710

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-28709 - Acronis
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-28709 - Acronis Criticidade: Média Ferramenta: Acronis Categoria: Segurança Fonte: NVD CVSS: 4.3 Resumo: Unauthorized resource manipulation due to improper authorization checks. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Linux, Windows) before build 41186. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-28709

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2025-30413 - Acronis
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2025-30413 - Acronis Criticidade: Média Ferramenta: Acronis Categoria: Segurança Fonte: NVD CVSS: 4.4 Resumo: Credentials are not deleted from Acronis Agent after plan revocation. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud Agent (Linux, macOS, Windows) before build 40497, Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Linux, macOS, Windows) before build 41186. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-30413

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2025-11792 - Acronis
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2025-11792 - Acronis Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Acronis Categoria: Segurança Fonte: NVD CVSS: 7.3 Resumo: Local privilege escalation due to DLL hijacking vulnerability. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud Agent (Windows) before build 41124. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-11792

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2025-11791 - Acronis
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2025-11791 - Acronis Criticidade: Média Ferramenta: Acronis Categoria: Segurança Fonte: NVD CVSS: 5.5 Resumo: Sensitive information disclosure and manipulation due to insufficient authorization checks. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Linux, macOS, Windows) before build 41186, Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud Agent (Linux, macOS, Windows) before build 41124. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-11791

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2025-11790 - Acronis
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2025-11790 - Acronis Criticidade: Média Ferramenta: Acronis Categoria: Segurança Fonte: NVD CVSS: 4.4 Resumo: Credentials are not deleted from Acronis Agent after plan revocation. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud Agent (Linux, macOS, Windows) before build 41124. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-11790

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-26124 - Azure
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-26124 - Azure Criticidade: Média Ferramenta: Azure Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 6.7 Resumo: '.../...//' in Azure Compute Gallery allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-26124

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-26122 - Azure
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-26122 - Azure Criticidade: Média Ferramenta: Azure Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 6.5 Resumo: Initialization of a resource with an insecure default in Azure Compute Gallery allows an authorized attacker to disclose information over a network. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-26122

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-23651 - Azure
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-23651 - Azure Criticidade: Média Ferramenta: Azure Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 6.7 Resumo: Permissive regular expression in Azure Compute Gallery allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-23651

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-2593 - WordPress
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-2593 - WordPress Criticidade: Média Ferramenta: WordPress Categoria: Sistemas / Cloud Fonte: NVD CVSS: 6.4 Resumo: The Greenshift – animation and page builder blocks plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the `_gspb_post_css` post meta value and the `dynamicAttributes` block attribute in all versions up to, and including, 12.8.5 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Contributor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-2593

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-28479 - Docker
item.description: 🚨 Notícia: CVE-2026-28479 - Docker Criticidade: Alta Ferramenta: Docker Categoria: Infraestrutura Fonte: NVD CVSS: 7.5 Resumo: OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.15 use SHA-1 to hash sandbox identifier cache keys for Docker and browser sandbox configurations, which is deprecated and vulnerable to collision attacks. An attacker can exploit SHA-1 collisions to cause cache poisoning, allowing one sandbox configuration to be misinterpreted as another and enabling unsafe sandbox state reuse. Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-28479
